channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [TRESCON] Trescon Ltd Board Meeting Scheduled for May 12, 2026
item.description:
Trescon Ltd has announced that a meeting of its Board of Directors is scheduled for May 12, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The announcement was made to the BSE under Regulations 29(1)(a) and 33 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Trescon Ltd's board will meet on May 12, 2026.
  • The meeting will address the audited financial results.
  • Results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • The announcement complies with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Trescon Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RAJINFRA] Rajeswari Infra Submits Unaudited Standalone Results
item.description:
Rajeswari Infrastructure Ltd submits unaudited standalone financial results and limited review report for the quarter and half year ended September 30, 2025, as per SEBI LODR 2015. The company was under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) and the resolution plan was approved on January 13, 2026. A Monitoring Committee oversees the company's management, and the financial statements are prepared on a going concern basis.

  • Rajeswari Infrastructure submits unaudited standalone financial results as per SEBI regulations.
  • Company was under CIRP; resolution plan approved on January 13, 2026.
  • Monitoring Committee oversees management; financial statements prepared on a going concern basis.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajeswari Infrastructure Limited | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RAJINFRA] Rajeswari Infra Submits Unaudited Standalone Financial Results
item.description:
Rajeswari Infrastructure Ltd submits unaudited standalone financial results and limited review report for the third quarter ended December 31, 2025, as per Regulation 33 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. The company was under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) and is now overseen by a Monitoring Committee following the approval of a resolution plan by the NCLT. The financial statements have been prepared on a going concern basis.

  • Rajeswari Infrastructure submits unaudited standalone financial results for Q3 ended December 31, 2025.
  • The company was under CIRP, with a resolution plan approved by NCLT on January 13, 2026.
  • A Monitoring Committee now oversees the company's management and operations.
  • Financial statements are prepared on a going concern basis following CIRP conclusion.
  • Sanjay Mehra, the former Resolution Professional, is now the Chairman of the Monitoring Committee.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajeswari Infrastructure Limited | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [WARDINMOBI] Wardwizard Appoints Pratik Joshi as CFO (KMP), Eff. May 3, 2026
item.description:
Wardwizard Innovations & Mobility Ltd has appointed Mr. Pratik Kirit Joshi as the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) of the company, effective May 3, 2026. Mr. Joshi brings over 18 years of experience in logistics, telecom, customer service, and financial consulting. His appointment aims to strengthen the company's financial management and governance framework, supporting its growing business operations and long-term growth strategy. He previously served as CEO of S D Corporation and Shree Dutt Group.

  • Pratik Kirit Joshi appointed as CFO (KMP) of Wardwizard Innovations & Mobility Ltd.
  • Appointment effective from May 3, 2026.
  • Joshi has over 18 years of experience in diverse sectors.
  • He previously served as CEO of S D Corporation and Shree Dutt Group.
  • Appointment aims to strengthen financial management and support growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Wardwizard Innovations & Mobility Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [RAJINFRA] Rajeswari Infra Submits Audited Results for March 2026
item.description:
Rajeswari Infrastructure Ltd submitted its audited standalone financial results and auditor's report for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI LODR 2015. The company was under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) until January 13, 2026, when the resolution plan was approved by NCLT. A Monitoring Committee now oversees the company's management, with financial statements prepared on a going concern basis. The results were approved by the Monitoring Committee on May 1, 2026, and signed by the Statutory Auditor.

  • Rajeswari Infrastructure submits audited standalone financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
  • The company was under CIRP until January 13, 2026, with a resolution plan approved by NCLT.
  • A Monitoring Committee now manages the company, following the approved resolution plan.
  • Financial statements have been prepared on a going concern basis.
  • Auditor's report includes a disclaimer of opinion due to the CIRP.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajeswari Infrastructure Limited | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [WARDINMOBI] Wardwizard: CFO Change Revises Materiality Authority
item.description:
Wardwizard Innovations & Mobility Ltd. has revised the authorities for determining the materiality of events and disclosures following the appointment of Mr. Pratik Kirit Joshi as the new Chief Financial Officer, effective May 3, 2026. The revised authorities include Mr. Yatin Sanjay Gupte (Chairman & Managing Director), Mr. Pratik Kirit Joshi (Chief Financial Officer), and Ms. Jaya Ashok Bhardwaj (Company Secretary and Compliance Officer). This update is in compliance with Regulation 30(5) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Mr. Pratik Kirit Joshi appointed as new CFO, effective May 3, 2026.
  • Revision in authorities for determining materiality of events.
  • Key Managerial Personnel (KMPs) authorized for disclosures.
  • Compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
  • Information available on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Wardwizard Innovations & Mobility Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [RAJINFRA] Rajeswari Infra Submits Unaudited Results for Half Year Ended Sept '24
item.description:
Rajeswari Infrastructure Ltd submitted unaudited financial results and the limited review report for the half year ended September 30, 2024, as per Regulation 33 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations. The company was under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) and is now overseen by a Monitoring Committee following the approval of a resolution plan. The financial statements have been prepared on a going concern basis, approved by the Monitoring Committee and the Statutory Auditor.

  • Rajeswari Infra submits unaudited financial results for H1 ended September 30, 2024.
  • The company was under CIRP, now managed by a Monitoring Committee.
  • Financial statements prepared on a going concern basis.
  • Limited review report issued by the statutory auditor.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajeswari Infrastructure Limited | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RAJINFRA] Rajeswari Infra Submits Unaudited Q3 FY25 Results
item.description:
Rajeswari Infrastructure Ltd has submitted its unaudited standalone financial results and limited review report for the third quarter ended December 31, 2024, as per Regulation 33 of the SEBI LODR 2015. The company was under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) and is now managed by a Monitoring Committee following the approval of a resolution plan. The financial statements have been prepared on a going concern basis, approved by the Monitoring Committee and the Statutory Auditor.

  • Unaudited standalone financial results for Q3 FY25 submitted as per SEBI LODR 2015.
  • Company was under CIRP; resolution plan approved on January 13, 2026.
  • Monitoring Committee constituted to manage operations as per the resolution plan.
  • Financial statements prepared on a going concern basis.
  • Independent Auditor's Limited Review Report issued with a Disclaimer of Opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajeswari Infrastructure Limited | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RAJINFRA] Rajeswari Infra Audited Results for FY25 Submitted
item.description:
Rajeswari Infrastructure Ltd has submitted its audited financial results and audit report for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2025, as per Regulation 33 of SEBI (LODR) Regulation 2015. The company was under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) and is now managed by a Monitoring Committee following the approval of a resolution plan. The financial statements have been prepared on a going concern basis, approved by the Monitoring Committee, and audited by the Statutory Auditor.

  • Audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2025, submitted.
  • Company was under CIRP; resolution plan approved on January 13, 2026.
  • Monitoring Committee constituted to manage operations as per the resolution plan.
  • Financial statements prepared on a going concern basis.
  • Independent Auditor's Report issued on the audited financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajeswari Infrastructure Limited | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RAJINFRA] Rajeswari Infra Submits Unaudited Standalone Results
item.description:
Rajeswari Infrastructure Ltd submits unaudited standalone financial results and limited review report for the quarter ended June 30, 2025, as per SEBI LODR 2015. The company was under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) until January 13, 2026. A Monitoring Committee now oversees the company, and financial statements are prepared on a going concern basis. The Statutory Auditor signed the statement on May 1, 2026.

  • Rajeswari Infrastructure submits unaudited standalone financial results for Q1 2026.
  • The company was under CIRP, which concluded on January 13, 2026.
  • A Monitoring Committee now manages the company's operations.
  • Financial statements are prepared on a going concern basis after CIRP.
  • Statutory Auditor issued a limited review report for the quarter.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajeswari Infrastructure Limited | Category: Quarterly Result
